title: teucrium cossonii
intro: Teucrium cossonii, also known as Spanish germander, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Teucrium cossonii include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and improving digestive function, making it a natural remedy for various gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Teucrium cossonii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
